messages.content:
Summarize the CVE description using professional cybersecurity terms.

TinyMCE versions before 5.10.0 are affected by a cross-site scripting vulnerability. A remote and unauthenticated attacker could introduce crafted image or link URLs that would result in the execution of arbitrary JavaScript in an editing user's browser.

TinyMCE versions prior to 5.10.0 contain a cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability. This allows a remote attacker without authentication to execute arbitrary JavaScript by introducing specially crafted image or link URLs, targeting the user's browser during editing.
